2603.26571.title: Generation Is Compression: Zero-Shot Video Coding via Stochastic Rectified Flow
2603.26571.paper_summary: Existing generative video compression methods use generative models only as post-hoc reconstruction modules atop conventional codecs. We propose \emph{Generative Video Codec} (GVC), a zero-shot framework that turns a pretrained video generative model into the codec itself: the transmitted bitstream directly specifies the generative decoding trajectory, with no retraining required. To enable this, we convert the deterministic rectified-flow ODE of modern video foundation models into an equivalent SDE at inference time, unlocking per-step stochastic injection points for codebook-driven compression. Building on this unified backbone, we instantiate three complementary conditioning strategies -- \emph{Image-to-Video} (I2V) with adaptive tail-frame atom allocation, \emph{Text-to-Video} (T2V) operating at near-zero side information as a pure generative prior, and \emph{First-Last-Frame-to-Video} (FLF2V) with boundary-sharing GOP chaining for dual-anchor temporal control. Together, these variants span a principled trade-off space between spatial fidelity, temporal coherence, and compression efficiency. Experiments on standard benchmarks show that GVC achieves high-quality reconstruction below 0.002\,bpp while supporting flexible bitrate control through a single hyperparameter.
2603.26571.paper_summary_zh: 現有的生成視頻壓縮方法僅將生成模型用作傳統編解碼器之上的後處理重建模塊。我們提出了\emph{生成視頻編解碼器}（GVC），這是一個零樣本框架，將預訓練的視頻生成模型轉變為編解碼器本身：傳輸的比特流直接指定生成解碼軌跡，無需重新訓練。為了實現這一點，我們將現代視頻基礎模型的確定性修正流ODE轉換為推理時的等效SDE，解鎖每步隨機注入點以實現基於碼本的壓縮。在這個統一的骨幹上，我們實現了三種互補的條件策略——\emph{圖像到視頻}（I2V）具有自適應尾幀原子分配，\emph{文本到視頻}（T2V）在接近零側信息的情況下作為純生成先驗運行，以及\emph{首尾幀到視頻}（FLF2V）具有邊界共享的GOP鏈接以實現雙錨定時間控制。這些變體共同涵蓋了空間保真度、時間一致性和壓縮效率之間的原則性權衡空間。標準基準上的實驗表明，GVC在低於0.002\,bpp的情況下實現了高質量的重建，同時通過單個超參數支持靈活的比特率控制。
2603.26571.author: Ziyue Zeng et.al.
2603.26571.authors: Ziyue Zeng, Xun Su, Haoyuan Liu, Bingyu Lu, Yui Tatsumi, Hiroshi Watanabe
